customVulnerability1: Limited social media monitoring for potential threats
customOFC1: Implement social media threat monitoring program and train staff on recognizing suspicious online activity
commendableAction1: Implemented comprehensive visitor management system with photo ID verification and escort requirements
commendableImpact1: Significantly improved facility access control and visitor accountability
commendableAction2: Integrated all security systems into unified command center with 24/7 monitoring
commendableImpact2: Enhanced situational awareness and reduced response times to security incidents
commendableAction3: Conducted quarterly security awareness training with realistic threat scenarios
commendableImpact3: Improved employee vigilance and incident reporting, leading to early threat detection

assessmentSummary.overallSecurityPosture: Middle-of-the-road with good practices in physical security and planning, but room for improvement in communications and information sharing

vulnerabilityDetails.vulnerability: No interoperable communications with law enforcement
vulnerabilityDetails.optionsForConsideration: Establish interoperable communications systems and protocols

vulnerabilityDetails.vulnerability: No interoperable communications with fire response
vulnerabilityDetails.optionsForConsideration: Implement interoperable communications with fire response agencies

vulnerabilityDetails.vulnerability: No onsite visits from emergency medical response agency
vulnerabilityDetails.optionsForConsideration: Invite medical response agency for facility tours and emergency planning

vulnerabilityDetails.vulnerability: No interoperable communications with emergency medical response
vulnerabilityDetails.optionsForConsideration: Establish interoperable communications with medical response agencies

vulnerabilityDetails.vulnerability: Not participating in ISAC information sharing
vulnerabilityDetails.optionsForConsideration: Join relevant Information Sharing and Analysis Centers

vulnerabilityDetails.vulnerability: Not using HSIN portal for information exchange
vulnerabilityDetails.optionsForConsideration: Register for and utilize Homeland Security Information Network portal

vulnerabilityDetails.vulnerability: No information exchange with neighboring facilities
vulnerabilityDetails.optionsForConsideration: Establish information sharing relationships with neighboring facilities

strengths: Regular law enforcement and fire agency visits
Active participation in FBI InfraGard program
Advanced video surveillance with analytics capabilities
Comprehensive perimeter and access control systems
recommendations: Implement interoperable communications with all emergency response agencies
Establish ISAC participation for sector-specific threat information
Utilize HSIN portal for federal information sharing
Develop relationships with neighboring facilities for information exchange
Enhance social media threat monitoring capabilities
